mapper.sql: id, event_name, event_type_id, event_status, event_level, event_content, event_publisher, create_time,expire_date, update_time, remark, close_remark, is_delete,is_single,report_status,report_member_id, lng,lat,address,happen_time,is_need_intervene,event_form
mapper.select: SELECT ei.id as eventId, ei.event_name as eventName, ei.event_type_id as eventTypeId,ei.address,ei.remark, ei.is_single as isSingle,ei.is_need_intervene as isNeedIntervene,ei.close_remark as closeRemark, eti.type_name as typeName, ei.event_status as eventStatus,ei.address,ei.lng,ei.lat,ei.event_form as eventForm, ei.event_level as eventLevel, ei.event_content as eventContent,ei.happen_time as happenTime, ei.create_time as createTime,ei.report_member_id as reportMemberId, emi.pic1_path as pic1Path,emi.pic2_path as pic2Path,emi.pic3_path as pic3Path, emi.video_path as videoPath,emi.file_path as filePath FROM event_info ei LEFT JOIN event_type_info eti ON ei.event_type_id = eti.id LEFT JOIN event_media_info emi ON ei.id = emi.event_id where ei.id = #{eventId}

SELECT ei.id, ei.event_name eventName, ei.event_status eventStatus, ei.event_level eventLevel, ei.expire_date expireDate,ei.lng,ei.lat,ei.address,ei.happen_time happenTime, edm.is_assigned isAssigned FROM event_depart_member edm LEFT JOIN department_member dm ON dm.id = edm.depart_member_id LEFT JOIN event_info ei ON ei.id = edm.event_id WHERE ei.report_status = 2 AND ei.is_delete = 0 AND dm.department_id = #{departId}
and ei.event_status=#{eventStatus}
mapper.insert: insert into event_info( id, event_name, event_type_id, event_status, event_level, event_content, event_publisher, create_time,expire_date, update_time, remark, is_delete,is_single,report_status,report_member_id,lng,lat,address,happen_time,is_need_intervene )values ( #{id}, #{eventName}, #{eventTypeId}, #{eventStatus}, #{eventLevel}, #{eventContent}, #{eventPublisher}, #{createTime}, #{expireDate}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{isDelete}, #{isSingle}, #{reportStatus}, -1, #{lng}, #{lat}, #{address}, #{happenTime}, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT ei.id, ei.create_time, ei.event_publisher, dm.`name`, dm.title, dm.head_icon headIcon FROM event_info ei LEFT JOIN department_member dm ON ei.report_member_id = dm.id WHERE ei.id = #{id}
SELECT edm.assigned_time, dm.`name`, dm.title, dm.head_icon headIcon FROM event_depart_member edm LEFT JOIN department_member dm on edm.depart_member_id=dm.id where edm.event_id=#{id}

SELECT mnmt.notify_time, mnmt.departmember_id, mnmt.event_id, dm.`name`, dm.title, dm.head_icon headIcon FROM msg_notify_member_task mnmt left join department_member dm on mnmt.departmember_id=dm.id WHERE event_id =#{id}
SELECT ef.create_time, ef.check_time, dm.`name`, dm.title, dm.head_icon headIcon FROM event_feedback ef LEFT JOIN department_member dm ON ef.departmember_id = dm.id WHERE event_id = #{id}
